title: getCanonicalTasks(): add in-process TTL cache to reduce disk reads
handoff_notes: Added 5s TTL cache to getCanonicalTasks() in tasks.ts. Extracted disk-read logic into readAllCanonicalTasksFromDisk(). getCanonicalTasks() returns cached result within TTL; writeCanonicalTask() calls invalidateTaskCache() so writes are immediately visible. TypeScript compiles clean. Committed cdaa513.

artifacts.description: Added _taskCache, invalidateTaskCache(), readAllCanonicalTasksFromDisk(); wired cache into getCanonicalTasks() and writeCanonicalTask()
